title: Corpus Registry Entry
description: A registered corpus within PPW. Metadata-only: corpus texts are not stored in PPW, only referenced by provenance link.

corpusType.description: deep-case: single-actor/period corpus at depth; comparative: multi-case cross-case corpus.

originModuleId.description: ID of the evidence module that owns this corpus (references evidence-module.schema.json).

caseIds.description: PPW case IDs this corpus contributes evidence for.

documentCount.description: Total number of documents in the corpus.

documentIds.description: Stable IDs for documents in the corpus (from source repository segmentation output).

samplingFrame.description: Description of how documents were selected: selection rationale, stratification, or sampling methodology.

corpusPurpose.description: core: fully annotated; validation: lighter annotation for reliability sampling; reference: indexed only, not annotated.

rightsStatus.description: Copyright and rights status for corpus texts.

normalizationStatus.description: Whether corpus texts have been normalized (whitespace, encoding, edition-specific artifacts).

segmentationStatus.description: Whether corpus texts have been segmented into stable, ID-bearing passages.

annotationStatus.description: Whether corpus passages have been annotated with claim candidates.

reliabilityStatus.description: Inter-annotator reliability assessment status for this corpus.

claimPromotionStatus.description: Whether draft claims from this corpus have been promoted through PPW review gates.

sourceIssueMigrationStatus.description: Status of issue migration from the source repository for this corpus.

sourceIssueRefs.description: References to source repository issues or PPW issues related to this corpus (e.g. github:ashitaka-emishi/lincoln-metaphor-analysis#12).

notes.description: Free-text notes about corpus state, known gaps, or upcoming work.
